overlay_components.role: cross-asset return std vs rolling-60 median (v1 carryover)
BTC realized_volatility_20 60-bar percentile (v2 add) — fires for sustained-vol regimes that shock-based v1 components miss
30-bar smoothed cross-asset return (v2 add) — captures slow-grind drawdown regimes

lineage.calibration_audit_2026_04_29: Initial v2 hyperparameters (f55_thresh 0.5, full 1.0, K=8, no per-component floor) gave a degenerate distribution: median at overall floor 0.30, 50.5% of days at floor. Softened to: f55_thresh 0.7 (only top 30% of vol-regime days throttled by F55), f55_full 1.5 (m_f55 caps at 0.625 even at q=1.0), K=3.0 (cum_signal at -0.001/day x 30 bars yields m_trailing=0.91), and per-component floor 0.5 for m_f55 and m_trailing so the v2 extras alone cannot drive product below 0.25. Result: median 0.553, fraction_at_floor 18.0%, fraction_at_full 4.1% (vs v1's 0.755 / 10.7% / 12.0%). v2 reduces median exposure ~27% relative to v1 — trade exposure for sustained-vol throttling.
lineage.selection_rule: Identical to v_alpha_v1_lsk3_g in score / signs / required_feature_columns / portfolio construction. Differs only in profile_constraints.position_multiplier_overlay_id: "alpha_ontology_regime_gating_v2" instead of v1. The v2 overlay multiplies in F55 (BTC vol regime quantile) and trailing universe mean return on top of v1's F49 / F26 / F44, so it fires on sustained-vol / slow-grind regimes that v1 missed. Score function and gates are unchanged.

regime_delta_vs_lsk3.positive_regime_fraction: 0.333 (1/3 same as un-gated lsk3, vs 2/3 lsk3_g_v1)
regime_delta_vs_lsk3.rotation_high_vol_2025q4: -0.589 (vs lsk3 -1.608, lsk3_g_v1 +0.888) — partial fix, doesn't flip positive but lifts off worst regime
regime_delta_vs_lsk3.drawdown_rebound_2026ytd: -1.851 (vs lsk3 -1.439, lsk3_g_v1 -2.243) — recovers most of v1 regression while keeping above v10 -2.0 floor

lineage.verified_outcome_2026_04_29: v2 strict_passes (regime_holdout.passed=True) AND keeps walk-forward gain at +0.398 vs un-gated lsk3 (only -0.063 below v1_g). Worst regime drawdown_rebound_2026ytd lifts from v1_g's -2.243 back to -1.851, above the v10 -2.0 floor. Trade-off: positive_regime_fraction reverts to 1/3 (same as un-gated baseline) — v2 partially fixes rotation_high_vol_2025q4 (-1.608 -> -0.589) but doesn't flip it positive like v1_g did (+0.888). The trade is intentional: v2 throttles enough on slow-grind regimes (drawdown_rebound) to clear the worst-regime contract floor, at the cost of v1's full rotation flip.

thesis_profile.market_mechanism: W3.5 v2 regime-gated lsk3: same xs_alpha_ontology_v1_score (v91 9 + F33 + F12) and same long-short top-3 perp construction as v_alpha_v1_lsk3, with a position-size multiplier overlay applied at the portfolio sizing layer. The v2 overlay multiplier in [0.30, 1.00] is built from F49 + F26 + F44 (v1 carryover) plus F55 (BTC vol regime quantile, 60-bar percentile) and a 30-bar trailing universe mean return. Hypothesis: v1's overlay gave +0.46 walk-forward sharpe but regressed worst-regime median to -2.243 because shock-based gauges miss slow-grind regimes; v2 adds F55 and trailing-return components that fire on sustained-vol / sustained-negative-mean windows, which should pull worst-regime back above the v10 -2.0 floor. Multiplier mean is ~0.576 over 2023-04 to 2026-04 (vs v1's ~0.713), so absolute returns will be lower than v1's gated variant; risk-adjusted metrics (worst regime, drawdown depth) are expected to improve.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: Same long-short top-3 perp signed-z-score construction as v_alpha_v1_lsk3. Position size is multiplied by the W3.5 v2 regime gating multiplier in [0.30, 1.00]. Falsified if (a) walk_forward median sharpe drops more than 0.7 below v_alpha_v1_lsk3 baseline (+1.748) without a matching improvement in regime_holdout worst-regime sharpe (v1_g baseline -2.243; target >= -2.0); OR (b) regime_holdout worst-regime fails to improve relative to v1_g; OR (c) execution_stress max_trade_participation_rate breaches the 0.005 cap.
thesis_profile.factor_formula: raw = -0.20*z(iv_smooth_60) -0.10*z(rv_5) +0.18*z(dh_60) +0.15*z(dh_5) -0.07*z(tt_smooth_5) -0.10*z(liquidity_stress_qv_iv) -0.06*z(momentum_decay_5_20) +0.05*z(taker_imb_dispersion) -0.05*z(quality_funding_oi) +0.10*z(downside_upside_vol_ratio_30) +0.07*z(funding_basis_residual_implied_repo_30); final_score = tanh((percentile_rank(raw)-0.5)*1.80); target_weight_per_name = (long_leverage / top_K - short_leverage / bottom_K) * regime_gating_v2_multiplier(t)

experimental_reason: SP-C Phase 2 control: v1_lsk3_g_v2 (no F-cascade or F62) at h10d to determine if rotation regime collapse is h10d-intrinsic (not factor-specific).
